noteTitle: The 2% of Engineers Winning the AI Era (Ex-Meta L8)
insightText: He predicts that human work shifts upward from writing each line toward requirements, architecture, risk control, evaluation, and improving the agent environment.

noteTitle: The 2% of Engineers Winning the AI Era (Ex-Meta L8)
insightText: The durable idea is to build a learning-and-verification loop, not a dependency on a fashionable AI coding tool. AI can amplify output, but unexamined output amplifies failure too. The valuable operator identifies the highest-leverage problem, delegates with clear guardrails, measures the result, and codifies what was learned so the next cycle is safer and faster.
